sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83428" key="plaqa/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλᾰθά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πλάσσω</etym>) <sense id="n83428.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">modelled figure</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.191d</biblScope> </bibl> ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κοροπλάθος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
